entry.title: Bill 56 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 24-32, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2025

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Justice Assistance Grant-Special Response Team Capability Enhancement Grant account ($78,671)

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-06-04

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 56 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 24-32, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2025

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Justice Assistance Grant-Special Response Team Capability Enhancement Grant account ($78,671)

Latest action: Council: Bill 56 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25

View on the council site
